title: An Act to Further Protect Victims from Contact Prohibited by Probation Conditions
last_house_action: 1/6/2025 - Received by the Clerk of the House on January 6, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
last_senate_action: 2/25/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
